reviews.review_description: Do not waste the money on these apps. The controls are terrible and the games will lock up forcing a reboot. Also, there is no refund available for these games. Do not waste your money.

Game seems to be designed by a bunche of apes i think. Issues like acceleration 0 to 1000 in 0.5 sec. Jets behave like helicopters. Yoke is totaly unrealistic. The models look amazing sadly the game is not.
Not helpful. Not well designed. Doesn’t work well.
Unfortunetly cannot fly free, it consists of 3 levels in which you cannot freely use plane controls its a shame
How to get a refund on this 3 pack?

This has great potential for anyone interested in general aviation and especially those training in a Cessna 172R. There are some issues, I’d prefer controllers rather than the vagaries of hand tracking. Perhaps in the next update the altimeter, flaps and throttle could be fixed, I had to hold the throttle out continuously get to an idling airspeed. Stepping out of the cockpit gives a good 172 model that could lead to a walk round inspection. Well done to the the developers trying to create a training/sim, it’s what standalone VR needs.

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying our simulator and valuable feedback. e have noted down your points and hopefully next updates will fix them. And will add controllers also along with hand gestures. Thanks again.

reviews.review_description: Not only is the cockpit built for a giant, but once I took off, then what?  I'm just flying around! It never did anything after that I'm going to get my money back

developer_response.body: Thanks for trying. We are still in development stage. This is an early access. Soon we will get live with very interesting flying challenges, class work, flying assessments, Live real pilot coach and flying over actual world 3d maps and airports and terrain. Stay tune.
